channel.description: Monitor this channel for new comments

questions.template: Thanks for the question! I appreciate your interest. Could you share more about what you're trying to achieve? That way I can give you a more personalized answer. Feel free to check our FAQ or contact us directly for more details.

praise.template: Thank you so much for the kind words! This means the world. I'm grateful you found value in the content. Please keep the feedback coming — it helps us improve! 🙏
